problem: Can protein structure be predicted from sequence in real time without AlphaFold compute cost?
hypothesis: Neuromorphic spike-timing dependent plasticity may resolve Can protein structure be predicted from sequence in real time without AlphaFold compute cost? by activating at the systems level.

experiment.protocol: Hardware prototype with 2 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: In the beginner's mind there are many possibilities. In the expert's mind there are few. — Shunryu Suzuki
